features.name: Flyby
features.description: The pteranodon doesn't provoke an Opportunity Attack when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) Piercing damage.

tactical_info.combat_role: Scout - Flying dinosaur with hit-and-run tactics
tactical_info.positioning: Uses flyby to attack without retaliation
tactical_info.damage_output: 6 piercing per hit with aerial mobility
tactical_info.key_abilities: Flyby prevents opportunity attacks, high flight speed
tactical_info.weaknesses: Poor on ground, moderate HP for aerial creature
tactical_info.synergies: Excellent for aerial reconnaissance and harassment tactics
